Use Python to inspect the evidence, refine that world model from the newest history, and search or score candidate actions or short sequences against the current goal as you currently understand it.
Maintain a compact working world model of what the current level seems to contain, what actions appear to do, what the goal seems to be, what is still uncertain, and what plan currently looks best.

- Right green center: W (white)

- Initial right green center: B (black)

- Right green at cols 27-29 (outside right frame) with B center

- Right green in right frame with correct center

To get the right green past the purple bar, I need to either:
1. Move the purple bar
2. Move the green around the purple bar (UP or DOWN)
3. Some other mechanic
Let me try clicking on the right green and pressing UP multiple times to see if it can go above the purple bar.
